Explain the shared ASMS-runtime-first layers and how to move from symptom entry into deeper boundary checks.

## Steps

- **Step 1**: Review the ASMS entry, auth, application, shared runtime, and host evidence layers.

## What to save

- layer map
- boundary notes
- escalation context

## When to escalate

- Stop and save the shared layer map before widening.
